# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

apiVersion: v1
kind: OpenIDConnectConfig
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-service-account
  namespace: <your-namespace>
spec:
  client_id_with_audience: <ci-cd-service-account-client-id>
  issuer_url: https://accounts.google.com

---

apiVersion: iam.googleapis.com/v1
kind: Policy
metadata:
  name: project-owner-policy
  namespace: <your-namespace>
  annotations:
    resource.cloudplatform.googleapis.com/created-by-deployment-manager: "true"
spec:
  policyData: |
    {
      "version": "20151201",
      "statement": [
        {
          "resource": "*",
          "action": ["*"],
          "principal": "serviceAccount:<ci-cd-service-account-email>"
        }
      ]
    }

---

apiVersion: iam.googleapis.com/v1
kind: PolicyBinding
metadata:
  name: project-owner-binding
  namespace: <your-namespace>
  annotations:
    resource.cloudplatform.googleapis.com/created-by-deployment-manager: "true"
spec:
  policyData: $(ref project-owner-policy)
  subjects:
  - email: <ci-cd-service-account-email>
